roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATING CONVICTION FILED

/X  'THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON  04-02-21'/CAL  MOTION TOVACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOTOPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTYPLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF APRIL 19TH, 2002/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:04-05-2002/X: SENTENCE DATE:04-19-2002/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 04-05-2002 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 04-19-2002 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE//X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
/SAMOD:DEFENDANT SHALL STAY AT LEAST 50 YARDS AWAY FROM 520 JONES STREET ANDDERRICK VIVARETTA/
/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:03-28-03/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTWP:37/PJ:90 DAYS/ADDL CTS:35/PROB EXT:05-25-05/DTC/SA2:DERRICK VIVERRETTA AND 520 JONES ST/SAORD3/
/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ37D/CTS:37/WS/SA1:AL SHAPANUS AND 639 HYDE STREET/X:ETHIOPIAN INTERPRETER PRESENT FOR DEFENDANT,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/
CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:04-29-03/PROB ADM REV/SHER/
